questions.question: What are the main advantages and disadvantages of bus-based interconnection networks?
expectedPoints: Advantages: Simple implementation, low cost, easy to add devices
Disadvantages: Limited bandwidth, poor scalability, single point of failure
Suitable for small systems but not for large parallel computers

questions.question: Compare and contrast static and dynamic interconnection networks, providing examples of each type and discussing their appropriate applications.
expectedPoints: Definition of static networks with examples (mesh, ring, hypercube)
Definition of dynamic networks with examples (crossbar, multistage networks)
